allow: Bash(timeout 60 bash -c 'until grep -q "Started CocSheetApplication" /tmp/backend_run2.log 2>/dev/null && grep -q "ready in" /tmp/frontend_dev2.log 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; echo BOTH_READY')
Bash(timeout 60 bash -c 'until grep -q "Started CocSheetApplication" /tmp/backend_live.log 2>/dev/null && grep -q "ready in" /tmp/frontend_live.log 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; echo BOTH_READY')
